message:
test(graphql): add comprehensive unit tests for client and subscription modules

client.rs (~386 lines):
- SchemaValidationMode: default, equality, debug, clone/copy
- GraphqlClientMetrics: default zeros, increment tracking, snapshot eq/debug
- GraphqlClientConfig: default values, content-type header, debug
- GraphqlClientBuilder: new defaults, all with_* methods, chaining, build
- GraphqlClient: new, with_config, dedup state toggle, metrics snapshot,
  graphql_errors helper (with and without errors), clone, debug
- parse_retry_after: seconds, missing, non-numeric, zero
- truncate_body: short, exactly 4096, exceeds 4096, invalid UTF-8, empty
- hash_bytes: deterministic, different inputs, empty

subscription.rs (~304 lines):
- GraphqlWsMessage serde: connection_init, subscribe, next, complete,
  connection_ack, error, roundtrip
- decode_ws_message: text, binary, invalid JSON (text and binary),
  ping/pong/close protocol errors
- reconnect_config_from_ws: disabled, with max, unlimited, initial delay
- GraphqlSubscriptionConfig: default, debug, clone
- GraphqlSubscriptionClient: new, headers, config, clone, debug
- SUBSCRIPTION_ID constant check
- StreamError to GraphqlClientError conversion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
